{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232001425B4609611E5116E9A084"}"},"total":79},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7303411580958769957","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书特别好看，剧情精彩，就是不知道有没有女主，有没有cp？希望是无女主的，一口气直接看到了最后一张，真是太好看了[爱心][爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700458927,"group_id":"7290936304223652919","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好吃😋","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxSrgDa1ydMycANsou/6d9NrTrZxa5HpblJM+Mo3iSE7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/608f5d9a54bd4a9b8102a04ece1301c9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791982&x-signature=gn7iplR3jlKYWyaIcgE4xa4gCjI%3D","user_id":"2040284123504128","user_name":"希尔不是希格"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2040284123504128","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7290936304223652919","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈×无直播×无国运×非爽文×慢节奏×单/无女主×成长型主角】
五年前，世界各地突然出现大量羊皮卷，触碰到羊皮卷的人被称为契约者，进入怪谈世界。
人类与怪谈的斗争从此展开！
契约者通关，则怪谈烟消云散。
契约者失败，则怪谈降临现实。
五年后，随着越来越多的规则怪谈融入现实世界，人类处境岌岌可危。
某一天，江尘收到了远方父母寄来的包裹后，开始踏入这个危机四伏的世界……
从此，一个怪谈之上的最恐怖怪谈传说，开始在现实与怪谈世界流传……
【幸福之家怪谈】
规则如下：
1.不要吵到楼上的姥姥。
2.每天晚上八点至九点期间，需要帮爷爷清洗身体。
3.用完餐后，要夸赞妈妈的厨艺和美貌。
4.不要靠近爸爸。
5.不能拒绝妹妹玩游戏的请求。
6.每晚十点之前要哄弟弟睡觉。
7.不要相信钟表上的时间。
8.每天休息时间为晚上十一点到第二天凌晨七点，休息时间不能离开卧室。
隐藏规则：每天凌晨零点，你有一定机率可以打开家门，离开怪谈世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2749bca7789586508154db7b9f44565c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"黑羊座de白羊","author_id":"","book_id":"7290936304223652919","book_name":"规则怪谈：我竟是最恐怖怪谈","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280000","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7290937483699683901","read_count":"316","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"288479"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"117","tags":"悬疑脑洞,灵异,无女主,无后宫,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2749bca7789586508154db7b9f44565c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451302&x-signature=b04u%2B2IBqHMDwk1XZsqjPHrhF18%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2607673336933757","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.156308e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232001425B4609611E5116E9A084"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3
